kpis.name: IVMS Speed Compliance
kpis.description: In-Vehicle Monitoring speed policy compliance — critically failing (29% of trips show violations)

kpis.name: Incident Rate
kpis.description: Number of HSE incidents this period (target zero) — 2 serious incidents YTD

incidents.description: Flatbed truck rollover on Nizwa highway. Driver was exceeding speed limit. $50k equipment damage. No fatalities.
Lost cargo: 4 pump units missing from transit hub for 6 days. Root cause: manual inventory error.

notes: PetroLogistics ME has the largest heavy-lift fleet in the region and is the ONLY vendor with capacity to execute Daleel's 2025 North-Field expansion rig moves. Their equipment scheduling is very reliable (96.5% volume). However their safety culture is a documented failure: 71% IVMS compliance, 1 vehicle rollover, and a cargo damage rate 14x above target. Retention is a direct safety liability.
